reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about attribution of consumed CPU cycles and preventing high-priority threads from runaway memory consumption. Suggested that proactive reclaim is still worthwhile despite these challenges, but requires identifying reasonable and predictable semantics for allocating liability to participating groups.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: The thread discusses the relevance and feasibility of implementing proactive reclaim in memory cgroups, specifically addressing concerns about attribution of consumed CPU cycles and preventing high-priority threads from runaway memory consumption.
